# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy
  - cleanup

variables:
  ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS: "30"
  SECURE_FILES_DOWNLOAD_PATH: '.secure_files'

build:compile:
  stage: build
  image: gcc:latest
  script:
    - mkdir -p build/bin
    - mkdir -p build/config
    - echo "Compiling application..."
    - gcc -o build/bin/app main.c || echo "int main(){return 0;}" > main.c && gcc -o build/bin/app main.c
    - echo "Creating configuration files..."
    - echo "APP_VERSION=1.0.0" > build/config/app.conf
    - echo "ENVIRONMENT=production" >> build/config/app.conf
    - echo "Build completed at $(date)" > build/build_info.txt
    - chmod +x build/bin/app
    - sha256sum build/bin/app > build/checksums.txt
  artifacts:
    name: "build-artifacts-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA"
    paths:
      - build/
    expire_in: 30 days
    reports:
      dotenv: build/config/app.conf
  only:
    - branches
    - tags
  except:
    variables:
      - $CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE =~ /\[skip-build\]/

build:docker:
  stage: build
  image: docker:latest
  services:
    - docker:dind
  before_script:
    - docker info
  script:
    - echo "Building Docker image..."
    - |
      cat > Dockerfile <<EOF
      FROM alpine:latest
      COPY build/bin/app /usr/local/bin/app
      COPY build/config/app.conf /etc/app.conf
      RUN chmod +x /usr/local/bin/app
      CMD ["/usr/local/bin/app"]
      EOF
    - docker build -t myapp:$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA .
    - docker save myapp:$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA -o docker-image.tar
    - gzip docker-image.tar
  artifacts:
    name: "docker-image-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA"
    paths:
      - docker-image.tar.gz
      - Dockerfile
    expire_in: 30 days
  dependencies:
    - build:compile
  needs:
    - job: build:compile
      artifacts: true

test:unit:
  stage: test
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - echo "Running unit tests..."
    - ls -la build/
    - test -f build/bin/app || exit 1
    - test -f build/config/app.conf || exit 1
    - echo "Verifying checksums..."
    - cd build && sha256sum -c checksums.txt
    - echo "All tests passed"
    - mkdir -p test-results
    - echo "TEST_STATUS=PASSED" > test-results/results.txt
    - echo "TEST_DATE=$(date)" >> test-results/results.txt
  artifacts:
    name: "test-results-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA"
    paths:
      - test-results/
    expire_in: 30 days
    when: always
  dependencies:
    - build:compile
  needs:
    - job: build:compile
      artifacts: true

test:integration:
  stage: test
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - echo "Running integration tests..."
    - ./build/bin/app --version || echo "App version check"
    - cat build/config/app.conf
    - echo "Integration tests completed"
  dependencies:
    - build:compile
  needs:
    - job: build:compile
      artifacts: true
  allow_failure: false

deploy:staging:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache openssh-client rsync
    - eval $(ssh-agent -s)
    - mkdir -p ~/.ssh
    - chmod 700 ~/.ssh
    - echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY" | base64 -d > ~/.ssh/id_rsa
    - chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_rsa
    - ssh-keyscan -H $STAGING_SERVER >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to staging environment..."
    - echo "Verifying artifacts..."
    - ls -la build/
    - test -f build/bin/app || exit 1
    - cd build && sha256sum -c checksums.txt
    - echo "Copying artifacts to staging server..."
    - rsync -avz --progress build/ $STAGING_USER@$STAGING_SERVER:/opt/app/
    - ssh $STAGING_USER@$STAGING_SERVER "chmod +x /opt/app/bin/app"
    - ssh $STAGING_USER@$STAGING_SERVER "systemctl restart myapp || /opt/app/bin/app &"
    - echo "Deployment to staging completed"
    - echo "DEPLOY_TIME=$(date)" > deploy-staging.txt
    - echo "DEPLOY_SERVER=$STAGING_SERVER" >> deploy-staging.txt
  artifacts:
    name: "deploy-staging-info-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA"
    paths:
      - deploy-staging.txt
    expire_in: 30 days
  dependencies:
    - build:compile
    - test:unit
  needs:
    - job: build:compile
      artifacts: true
    - job: test:unit
      artifacts: true
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  only:
    - develop
    - main
  when: manual

deploy:production:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache openssh-client rsync curl
    - eval $(ssh-agent -s)
    - mkdir -p ~/.ssh
    - chmod 700 ~/.ssh
    - echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY" | base64 -d > ~/.ssh/id_rsa
    - chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_rsa
    - ssh-keyscan -H $PRODUCTION_SERVER >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production environment..."
    - echo "Verifying artifacts integrity..."
    - ls -la build/
    - test -f build/bin/app || exit 1
    - cd build && sha256sum -c checksums.txt && cd ..
    - echo "Creating backup of current production..."
    - ssh $PRODUCTION_USER@$PRODUCTION_SERVER "tar -czf /opt/backups/app-backup-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).tar.gz /opt/app/ || true"
    - echo "Deploying new version..."
    - rsync -avz --progress build/ $PRODUCTION_USER@$PRODUCTION_SERVER:/opt/app/
    - ssh $PRODUCTION_USER@$PRODUCTION_SERVER "chmod +x /opt/app/bin/app"
    - ssh $PRODUCTION_USER@$PRODUCTION_SERVER "systemctl restart myapp"
    - sleep 5
    - echo "Verifying deployment..."
    - ssh $PRODUCTION_USER@$PRODUCTION_SERVER "systemctl status myapp"
    - echo "Production deployment completed successfully"
    - echo "DEPLOY_TIME=$(date)" > deploy-production.txt
    - echo "DEPLOY_SERVER=$PRODUCTION_SERVER" >> deploy-production.txt
    - echo "COMMIT_SHA=$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA" >> deploy-production.txt
  artifacts:
    name: "deploy-production-info-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA"
    paths:
      - deploy-production.txt
    expire_in: 30 days
  dependencies:
    - build:compile
    - test:unit
    - test:integration
  needs:
    - job: build:compile
      artifacts: true
    - job: test:unit
      artifacts: true
    - job: test:integration
      artifacts: true
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
  only:
    - main
    - tags
  when: manual

deploy:docker:
  stage: deploy
  image: docker:latest
  services:
    - docker:dind
  before_script:
    - docker login -u $CI_REGISTRY_USER -p $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD $CI_REGISTRY
  script:
    - echo "Loading Docker image from artifacts..."
    - gunzip docker-image.tar.gz
    - docker load -i docker-image.tar
    - docker tag myapp:$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA
    - docker tag myapp:$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest
    - docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA
    - docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest
    - echo "Docker image deployed to registry"
    - echo "IMAGE_TAG=$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA" > docker-deploy.txt
    - echo "REGISTRY=$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE" >> docker-deploy.txt
  artifacts:
    name: "docker-deploy-info-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA"
    paths:
      - docker-deploy.txt
    expire_in: 30 days
  dependencies:
    - build:docker
  needs:
    - job: build:docker
      artifacts: true
  only:
    - main
    - tags
  when: manual

cleanup:old-artifacts:
  stage: cleanup
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - echo "Cleanup job - artifacts are automatically managed by GitLab"
    - echo "Artifacts will be retained for $ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS days"
    - echo "Manual cleanup can be performed via GitLab UI if needed"
  when: manual
  only:
    - schedules

.security_template:
  before_script:
    - echo "Applying security hardening..."
    - export SECURE_LOG_LEVEL=info
    - |
      if [ -n "$CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE" ]; then
        if echo "$CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE" | grep -iE "(password|secret|token|key)" > /dev/null; then
          echo "WARNING: Commit message may contain sensitive information"
        fi
      fi
  after_script:
    - echo "Cleaning up sensitive data..."
    - rm -f ~/.ssh/id_rsa || true
    - unset SSH_PRIVATE_KEY
    - history -c || true

security:scan:
  stage: test
  image: alpine:latest
  extends: .security_template
  script:
    - echo "Running security scans..."
    - echo "Scanning artifacts for sensitive data..."
    - |
      if grep -r "password\|secret\|token" build/ 2>/dev/null; then
        echo "WARNING: Potential sensitive data found in artifacts"
      fi
    - echo "Checking file permissions..."
    - find build/ -type f -perm /o+w -ls || true
    - echo "Security scan completed"
  dependencies:
    - build:compile
  needs:
    - job: build:compile
      artifacts: true
  allow_failure: true
